movies.title: The Cycle of Love
movies.review:
SFF# 2
First date: chai
Second date: meet the parents
Third date: 6,000 mile journey from India to Sweden.
So life affirming and inspiring. This movie gave me goosebumps - an absolute must see.

movies.title: No Good Men
movies.review:
SFF #1
Feeling conflicted about this one. On one hand it was laugh out loud funny, an engaging premise and politically important. On the other hand, I’m not sure if the ending leaves Qodrat ‘morally grey’ or simply the same as all other men Naru so actively resists.

movies.title: Backrooms
movies.review: I gave it 3 immediately upon exiting the movie but I have continued to think about it since then, so I’m upgrading to 3.5.

movies.title: Waking Ned Devine
movies.review: Watched this first in High School - not sure why we were watching it at school but I wasn’t complaining. Still just as funny and well worth a rewatch - best to go in without googling the synopsis imo.

movies.title: The Finisher: Jasmin Paris and the Barkley Marathons
movies.review: 🤘 fuck yeah the girls 🤘 Great inspo to watch during a training block - Jasmin Paris you absolute legend.
